summary_en: Tender offer disclosed for 京セラ. Take-private transaction removes the float and resets capital policy.
summary_jp: 京セラに対する公開買付を開示。非公開化により資本政策が再構築。

summary_en: 京セラ authorised a share buyback. Direct return of capital and a signal management views shares as undervalued.
summary_jp: 京セラが自己株式取得を決議。資本還元と株価評価のシグナル。

summary_en: 京セラ cancelled treasury stock. Permanent share-count reduction lifts per-share economics.
summary_jp: 京セラが自己株式消却を実施。発行済株式数が恒久的に減少。
